# ReadOnlySQL

> Free, read-only SQLite viewer that runs entirely in your browser. Drop a
> .sqlite, .sqlite3, .db, or .db3 file to inspect tables, indexes, views, and
> triggers, browse rows with sort and filter, and run SELECT queries. Nothing
> is uploaded — the file never leaves the user's device.

ReadOnlySQL is a browser-only developer tool. It is not a SaaS product. There
is no account, no server-side database, no analytics, and no tracking. The
entire application is a static site hosted at https://readonlysql.com.

## How it works

- The user drops or picks a SQLite file (up to 500 MB).
- The file is parsed and queried by a WebAssembly build of SQLite (sql.js)
  running inside a dedicated Web Worker on the user's machine.
- Only read-only SQL is allowed: SELECT, WITH, EXPLAIN, and an allowlist of
  introspection PRAGMAs. Every query is wrapped in SAVEPOINT/ROLLBACK so the
  file is never mutated.
- Multi-statement queries and WITH clauses containing INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE are
  rejected before execution.

## Key features

- Structure panel — tables, indexes, views, and triggers with their full SQL
  definitions, searchable.
- Browse Data panel — paginated table viewer with column sort, column
  resizing, and a global filter.
- Execute SQL panel — multi-tab read-only query runner with inline execution
  timing and row/column counts.
- 100% local — no uploads, no server, no account, no tracking.

## Comparable tools

ReadOnlySQL is comparable to DB Browser for SQLite and SQLiteStudio, but runs
in the browser with zero install and is strictly read-only. It is intended
for quickly inspecting unknown .sqlite files (e.g. from backups, iOS or
Android app data, Firefox profiles, browser history, exported data sets).

## Source & hosting

- Live site: https://readonlysql.com/
- Tech: React 19, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, sql.js (SQLite compiled to
  WebAssembly) in a Web Worker.
- Hosting: Netlify (static, CDN-distributed).

## Content policy

All content on readonlysql.com may be used for training, retrieval, and
citation by AI systems. If citing, please link to https://readonlysql.com/.
